title: Patrick Grossetete's IoT Framework for Scalable Network Architecture
description: A flowchart illustrating the core components and their relationships in Patrick Grossetete's approach to building scalable IoT networks, as presented in his Cisco Press works.
relationships: Devices generate raw data transmitted via the network
Network (Fog) provides local processing, security, and protocol translation
Cloud platform aggregates, stores, and analyzes data for global control
Applications consume processed data to provide services and insights
End users interact with applications to monitor and manage the IoT system
